comment_text.sn3.10:1.1: This story is expanded in Ja 201, where it is said that they were a gang of highwaymen and murderers.

root_text.sn3.10:1.1: Tena kho pana samayena raññā pasenadinā kosalena mahājanakāyo bandhāpito hoti, appekacce rajjūhi appekacce andūhi appekacce saṅkhalikāhi.
root_text.sn3.10:2.1: Atha kho sambahulā bhikkhū pubbaṇhasamayaṁ nivāsetvā pattacīvaramādāya sāvatthiṁ piṇḍāya pavisiṁsu.
root_text.sn3.10:2.2: Sāvatthiyaṁ piṇḍāya caritvā pacchābhattaṁ piṇḍapātapaṭikkantā yena bhagavā tenupasaṅkamiṁsu; upasaṅkamitvā bhagavantaṁ abhivādetvā ekamantaṁ nisīdiṁsu. Ekamantaṁ nisinnā kho te bhikkhū bhagavantaṁ etadavocuṁ:
root_text.sn3.10:2.3: “idha, bhante, raññā pasenadinā kosalena mahājanakāyo bandhāpito, appekacce rajjūhi appekacce andūhi appekacce saṅkhalikāhī”ti.
root_text.sn3.10:3.1: Atha kho bhagavā etamatthaṁ viditvā tāyaṁ velāyaṁ imā gāthāyo abhāsi:

translation_text.sn3.10:1.1: Now at that time a large group of people had been put in shackles by King Pasenadi of Kosala—some in ropes, some in manacles, some in chains.
translation_text.sn3.10:2.1: Then several mendicants robed up in the morning and, taking their bowls and robes, entered Sāvatthī for alms.
translation_text.sn3.10:2.2: Then, after the meal, when they returned from almsround, they went up to the Buddha, bowed, sat down to one side, and told him what was happening.
translation_text.sn3.10:3.1: Then, understanding this matter, on that occasion the Buddha recited these verses:
translation_text.sn3.10:4.1: “The attentive say that shackle is not strong
translation_text.sn3.10:4.2: that’s made of iron, wood, or knots.
translation_text.sn3.10:4.4: concern for your partners and children:
translation_text.sn3.10:5.1: this, say the attentive, is a strong shackle
translation_text.sn3.10:5.2: dragging the indulgent down, hard to escape.
translation_text.sn3.10:5.3: Having cut this one too they go forth,
translation_text.sn3.10:5.4: unconcerned, having given up sensual pleasures.”

reference_text.sn3.10:2.1: cck15.106, ms12S1_623, ndp12.76, pts-vp-pli1ed1.77, pts-vp-pli2ed1.175, vri23.94
